title: The Calcutta Land-Revenue Act, 1856
full_text: The Calcutta Land-Revenue Act, 1856 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1856-18 Act Number: 18 Enactment Date: 1856-08-23 Act Year: 1856 Short Title: The Calcutta Land-Revenue Act, 1856 Long Title: AN ACT relating to the administration of the Public Revenues in the Town of Calcutta. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 23-08-1856 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Calcutta Land-Revenue Act, 1856 Show all section Section 1. Regulations modified. Section 2. Collection of Stamp Duty in Calcutta to be ordinarily in charge of the Collector. Section 3. Collector may entrust any part of his duties to his Deputy.
